items.title: Auditing Multimodal LLM Raters: Central Tendency Bias in Clinical Ordinal Scoring

items.title: AR-VLA: True Autoregressive Action Expert for Vision-Language-Action Models
items.abstract: We propose a standalone autoregressive (AR) Action Expert that generates actions as a continuous causal sequence while conditioning on refreshable vision-language prefixes. In contrast to existing Vis
